              def handle_combiner_wifi_on_so(project_id, sales_order_id, hdk_items)
          
      285. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    285. 
            
              2
            

            

                sales_order = Netsuite::SalesOrder.find(sales_order_id)
          
      286. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    286. 
            
              2
            

            

                return log_error(project_id, 'Could not fetch Sales Order for Combiner-WIFI update') unless sales_order
          
      287. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    287. 
            

            

            
          
      288. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    288. 
            
              2
            

            

                items = sales_order.dig('item', 'items')&.deep_dup || []
          
      289. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    289. 
            

            

            
          
      290. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    290. 
            
              2
            

            

                existing_combiner = items.find do |item|
          
      291. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    291. 
            
              3
            

            

                  item.dig('item', 'id').to_s == COMBINER_WIFI_5_ITEM_ID
          
      292. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    292. 
            

            

                end
          
      293. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    293. 
            

            

            
          
      294. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    294. 
            
              2
            

            

                if hdk_items.any?
          
      295. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    295. 
            

            

                  # HDK item present - add or update Combiner-WIFI-5
          
      296. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    296. 
            
              2
            

            

                  total_quantity = hdk_items.sum { |item| item[:quantity] }
          
      297. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    297. 
            
              1
            

            

                  puts "Adding/updating Combiner-WIFI-5 (qty: #{total_quantity}) on Sales Order #{sales_order_id}"
          
      298. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    298. 
            

            

            
          
      299. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    299. 
            
              1
            

            

                  if existing_combiner
          
      300. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    300. 
            

            

                    # Skip if item has already been fulfilled
          
      301. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    301. 
            

            

                    if item_fulfilled?(existing_combiner)
          
      302. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    302. 
            

            

                      puts "  Combiner-WIFI-5 already fulfilled (line #{existing_combiner['line']}, " \
          
      303. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    303. 
            

            

                           "qty fulfilled: #{existing_combiner['quantityFulfilled']}), skipping"
          
      304. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    304. 
            

            

                      return
          
      305. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    305. 
            

            

                    end
          
      306. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    306. 
            

            

                    puts "  Combiner-WIFI-5 already exists on SO (line #{existing_combiner['line']}), updating quantity"
          
      307. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    307. 
            

            

                    existing_combiner['quantity'] = total_quantity
          
      308. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    308. 
            

            

                  else
          
      309. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    309. 
            

            

                    new_item = {
          
      310. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    310. 
            
              1
            

            

                      item: { id: COMBINER_WIFI_5_ITEM_ID },
          
      311. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    311. 
            

            

                      quantity: total_quantity,
          
      312. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    312. 
            

            

                      amount: 0
          
      313. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    313. 
            

            

                    }.merge(extract_class_and_location(items))
          
      314. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    314. 
            
              1
            

            

                    items << new_item
          
      315. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    315. 
            
              1
            

            

                    puts '  Adding new line item for Combiner-WIFI-5'
          
      316. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    316. 
            

            

                  end
          
      317. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    317. 
            
              1
            

            

                elsif existing_combiner
          
      318. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    318. 
            

            

                  # Skip removal if item has already been fulfilled
          
      319. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    319. 
            
              1
            

            

                  if item_fulfilled?(existing_combiner)
          
      320. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    320. 
            

            

                    puts "  Combiner-WIFI-5 already fulfilled (line #{existing_combiner['line']}), cannot remove"
          
      321. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    321. 
            

            

                    return
          
      322. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    322. 
            

            

                  end
          
      323. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    323. 
            

            

                  # HDK item not present - remove Combiner-WIFI-5 if it exists
          
      324. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    324. 
            
              1
            

            

                  puts "Removing Combiner-WIFI-5 from Sales Order #{sales_order_id} (no X-IQ-AM1-240-5-HDK in BOM)"
          
      325. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    325. 
            
              3
            

            

                  items.reject! { |item| item.dig('item', 'id').to_s == COMBINER_WIFI_5_ITEM_ID }
          
      326. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    326. 
            

            

                else
          
      327. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    327. 
            

            

                  puts 'No Combiner-WIFI-5 to remove (not present on SO)'
          
      328. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    328. 
            

            

                  return
          
      329. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    329.

    330.

    331. 
            

            

                body = {
          
      332. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    332. 
            
              2
            

            

                  item: {
          
      333. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    333. 
            

            

                    items: items
          
      334. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    334.

    336. 
            

            

            
          
      337. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    337.

      338. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    338. 
            
              2
            

            

                result = Netsuite::SalesOrder.update(sales_order_id, body, replace_item: true)
          
      339. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    339.

                puts "Combiner-WIFI-5 update result: #{result}"

    343. 
            

            

                nil
          
      344. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    344.

              def fetch_sales_order_id(project_id)

    348. 
            
              5
            

            

                external_id = "sales_order_#{project_id}"
          
      349. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    349. 
            
              5
            

            

                sales_order = Netsuite::SalesOrder.find_external(external_id)
          
      350. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    350. 
            
              5
            

            

                sales_order['id']&.to_i
          
      351. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    351. 
            

            

              rescue StandardError => e

                nil

              def update_racking_quantities(project_id, sales_order_id, sales_order, racking_items)
          
      357. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    357. 
            

            

                # Get the items from the sales order
          
      358. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    358. 
            

            

                so_items = sales_order.dig('item', 'items') || []
          
      359. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    359. 
            

            

            
          
      360. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    360. 
            

            

                if so_items.empty?
          
      361. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    361. 
            

            

                  log_error(project_id, 'Sales Order has no items')
          
      362. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    362. 
            

            

                  return
          
      363. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    363. 
            

            

                end
          
      364. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    364. 
            

            

            
          
      365. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    365. 
            

            

                # Pre-fetch all inventory item details to avoid repeated API calls
          
      366. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    366. 
            

            

                puts "Pre-fetching inventory item details for #{so_items.size} items..."
          
      367. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    367. 
            

            

                item_details_cache = build_item_details_cache(so_items)
          
      368. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    368. 
            

            

            
          
      369. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    369. 
            

            

                # Build a hash of aggregated quantities by SO line
          
      370. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    370. 
            

            

                # This handles cases where multiple BOM items map to the same SO item
          
      371. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    371. 
            

            

                # (e.g., PSR-HEC and PSR-MCZ-US both map to PSR-MCZ-US (DOMESTIC))
          
      372. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    372. 
            

            

                line_quantities = {}
          
      373. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    373. 
            

            

            
          
      374. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    374. 
            

            

                racking_items.each do |racking_item|
          
      375. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    375. 
            

            

                  bom_part_number = racking_item[:part_number]
          
      376. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    376. 
            

            

                  bom_quantity = racking_item[:quantity]
          
      377. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    377. 
            

            

            
          
      378. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    378. 
            

            

                  # PSR-B84 maps to PSR-M168-US (DOMESTIC) at half quantity
          
      379. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    379. 
            

            

                  bom_quantity = (bom_quantity / 2.0).ceil if bom_part_number == 'PSR-B84'
          
      380. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    380. 
            

            

            
          
      381. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    381. 
            

            

                  # Find matching item in Sales Order
          
      382. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    382. 
            

            

                  matching_so_item = find_matching_so_item(so_items, bom_part_number, item_details_cache)
          
      383. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    383. 
            

            

            
          
      384. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    384. 
            

            

                  if matching_so_item
          
      385. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    385. 
            

            

                    line_number = matching_so_item['line']
          
      386. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    386. 
            

            

                    so_part_number = get_part_number_from_item(matching_so_item, item_details_cache)
          
      387. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    387. 
            

            

                    current_quantity = matching_so_item['quantity'].to_i
          
      388. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    388. 
            

            

            
          
      389. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    389. 
            

            

                    # Skip if line item has already been fulfilled
          
      390. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    390. 
            

            

                    if item_fulfilled?(matching_so_item)
          
      391. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    391. 
            

            

                      puts "  Skipping fulfilled item: BOM #{bom_part_number} -> SO line #{line_number} " \
          
      392. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    392. 
            

            

                           "(quantityFulfilled: #{matching_so_item['quantityFulfilled']})"
          
      393. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    393. 
            

            

                      next
          
      394. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    394. 
            

            

                    end
          
      395. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    395. 
            

            

            
          
      396. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    396. 
            

            

                    puts "  Match found: BOM #{bom_part_number} (qty: #{bom_quantity}) -> SO line #{line_number} " \
          
      397. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    397. 
            

            

                         "#{so_part_number} (current qty: #{current_quantity})"
          
      398. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    398. 
            

            

            
          
      399. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    399. 
            

            

                    # Aggregate quantities for items that map to the same SO line
          
      400. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    400. 
            

            

                    if line_quantities[line_number]
          
      401. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    401. 
            

            

                      line_quantities[line_number][:new_quantity] += bom_quantity
          
      402. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    402. 
            

            

                      puts "    Aggregating with existing quantity: total now #{line_quantities[line_number][:new_quantity]}"
          
      403. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    403. 
            

            

                    else
          
      404. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    404. 
            

            

                      line_quantities[line_number] = {
          
      405. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    405. 
            

            

                        line: line_number,
          
      406. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    406. 
            

            

                        part_number: so_part_number,
          
      407. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    407. 
            

            

                        old_quantity: current_quantity,
          
      408. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    408. 
            

            

                        new_quantity: bom_quantity
          
      409. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    409. 
            

            

                      }
          
      410. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    410. 
            

            

                    end
          
      411. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    411. 
            

            

                  else
          
      412. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    412. 
            

            

                    puts "  WARNING: No matching item found in Sales Order for #{bom_part_number}"
          
      413. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    413. 
            

            

                  end
          
      414. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    414. 
            

            

                end
          
      415. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    415. 
            

            

            
          
      416. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    416. 
            

            

                # Build updates needed (only where quantity changed)
          
      417. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    417. 
            

            

                updates_needed = line_quantities.values.reject do |update|
          
      418. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    418. 
            

            

                  update[:old_quantity] == update[:new_quantity]
          
      419. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    419. 
            

            

                end
          
      420. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    420. 
            

            

            
          
      421. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    421. 
            

            

                if updates_needed.empty?
          
      422. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    422. 
            

            

                  puts 'No quantity updates needed - all quantities already match'
          
      423. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    423. 
            

            

                  return
          
      424. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    424. 
            

            

                end
          
      425. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    425. 
            

            

            
          
      426. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    426. 
            

            

                # Apply updates to Sales Order
          
      427. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    427. 
            

            

                apply_quantity_updates(sales_order_id, sales_order, updates_needed)
          
      428. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    428.

      429. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    429.

              def build_item_details_cache(so_items)
          
      431. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    431. 
            

            

                cache = {}
          
      432. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    432. 
            

            

            
          
      433. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    433. 
            

            

                so_items.each do |item|
          
      434. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    434. 
            

            

                  item_id = item.dig('item', 'id')
          
      435. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    435. 
            

            

                  next unless item_id
          
      436. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    436. 
            

            

                  next if cache[item_id] # Skip if already cached
          
      437. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    437. 
            

            

            
          
      438. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    438. 
            

            

                  begin
          
      439. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    439. 
            

            

                    inventory_item = Netsuite::InventoryItem.find(item_id)
          
      440. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    440. 
            

            

                    cache[item_id] = inventory_item
          
      441. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    441. 
            

            

                  rescue StandardError => e
          
      442. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    442. 
            

            

                    puts "Warning: Could not fetch inventory item #{item_id}: #{e.message}"
          
      443. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    443. 
            

            

                    cache[item_id] = nil
          
      444. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    444. 
            

            

                  end
          
      445. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    445. 
            

            

                end
          
      446. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    446. 
            

            

            
          
      447. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    447. 
            

            

                puts "Cached #{cache.size} inventory items"
          
      448. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    448. 
            

            

                cache
          
      449. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    449. 
            

            

              end
          
      450. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    450. 
            

            

            
          
      451. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    451. 
            
              1
            

            

              def find_matching_so_item(so_items, bom_part_number, item_details_cache)
          
      452. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    452. 
            

            

                # First try exact match
          
      453. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    453. 
            
              6
            

            

                match = so_items.find do |item|
          
      454. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    454. 
            
              11
            

            

                  so_part = get_part_number_from_item(item, item_details_cache)
          
      455. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    455. 
            
              11
            

            

                  so_part == bom_part_number
          
      456. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    456. 
            

            

                end
          
      457. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    457. 
            

            

            
          
      458. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    458. 
            
              6
            

            

                return match if match
          
      459. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    459. 
            

            

            
          
      460. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    460. 
            

            

                # Try matching with -US (DOMESTIC) suffix
          
      461. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    461. 
            
              5
            

            

                match = so_items.find do |item|
          
      462. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    462. 
            
              10
            

            

                  so_part = get_part_number_from_item(item, item_details_cache)
          
      463. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    463. 
            

            

                  # Check if SO part is domestic version (ends with -US (DOMESTIC))
          
      464. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    464. 
            
              10
            

            

                  normalized_so_part = so_part.gsub(/ \(DOMESTIC\)$/i, '')
          
      465. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    465. 
            
              10
            

            

                  normalized_so_part == bom_part_number
          
      466. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    466. 
            

            

                end
          
      467. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    467. 
            

            

            
          
      468. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    468. 
            
              5
            

            

                return match if match
          
      469. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    469. 
            

            

            
          
      470. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    470. 
            

            

                # Handle specific part number mappings between NetSuite and BOM
          
      471. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    471. 
            

            

                # PSR-M168-US (DOMESTIC) in NetSuite matches PSR-B168 in BOM
          
      472. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    472. 
            

            

                # PSR-MCZ-US (DOMESTIC) in NetSuite matches PSR-MCB in BOM
          
      473. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    473. 
            

            

                # PSR-M168-US (DOMESTIC) in NetSuite also matches PSR-B84 in BOM (at half quantity)
          
      474. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    474. 
            
              5
            

            

                so_items.find do |item|
          
      475. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    475. 
            
              8
            

            

                  so_part = get_part_number_from_item(item, item_details_cache)
          
      476. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    476. 
            
              8
            

            

                  case bom_part_number
          
      477. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    477. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-B168'
          
      478. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    478. 
            
              1
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-M168-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      479. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    479. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-B84'
          
      480. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    480. 
            
              1
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-M168-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      481. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    481. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-MCB'
          
      482. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    482. 
            
              2
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-MCZ-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      483. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    483. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-MCZ-US'
          
      484. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    484. 
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-MCZ-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      485. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    485. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-HEC'
          
      486. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    486. 
            
              2
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-MCZ-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      487. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    487. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-B168-US'
          
      488. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    488. 
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-M168-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      489. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    489. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-SPL'
          
      490. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    490. 
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-SPLS-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      491. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    491. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-SPLS-US'
          
      492. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    492. 
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-SPLS-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      493. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    493. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-MLP-US'
          
      494. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    494. 
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-MLP-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      495. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    495. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-SRC'
          
      496. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    496. 
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-SRC-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      497. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    497. 
            

            

                  when 'PSR-SRC-US'
          
      498. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    498. 
            

            

                    so_part == 'PSR-SRC-US (DOMESTIC)'
          
      499. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    499. 
            

            

                  else
          
      500. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    500. 
            
              2
            

            

                    false
          
      501. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    501. 
            

            

                  end
          
      502. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    502. 
            

            

                end
          
      503. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    503. 
            

            

              end

    504. 
            

            

            
          
      505. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    505. 
            
              1
            

            

              def get_part_number_from_item(so_item, item_details_cache)
          
      506. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    506. 
            

            

                # Try to get the item details to find part number
          
      507. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    507. 
            
              29
            

            

                item_id = so_item.dig('item', 'id')
          
      508. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    508. 
            

            

            
          
      509. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    509. 
            
              29
            

            

                if item_id && item_details_cache[item_id]
          
      510. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    510. 
            

            

                  # Use cached inventory item
          
      511. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    511. 
            
              29
            

            

                  inventory_item = item_details_cache[item_id]
          
      512. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    512. 
            
              29
            

            

                  part_number = inventory_item['itemId'] || inventory_item['name']
          
      513. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    513. 
            
              29
            

            

                  return part_number if part_number
          
      514. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    514. 
            

            

                end
          
      515. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    515. 
            

            

            
          
      516. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    516. 
            

            

                # Fallback to item name from SO
          
      517. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    517. 
            

            

                so_item.dig('item', 'refName') || so_item['itemName'] || ''
          
      518. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    518. 
            

            

              end
          
      519. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    519. 
            

            

            
          
      520. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    520. 
            
              1
            

            

              def apply_quantity_updates(sales_order_id, sales_order, updates)
          
      521. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    521. 
            

            

                puts "\nApplying #{updates.size} quantity updates to Sales Order #{sales_order_id}:"

                def scroll_search(index, body, size = 200, limit: nil)
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            

                    result = []
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            

                    response = @client.search(
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            

                        index:,
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            

                        body:,
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            

                        scroll: '15s',
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            

            

                        size:
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            

            

                    )
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

            
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

                    loop do
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            

                        hits = response.dig('hits', 'hits')
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            

                        break if hits.empty?
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                        break if limit && result.length >= limit
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

            
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

                        hits.each do |hit|
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                            result.push hit
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

                        end
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            

            
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

                        response = @client.scroll(
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

                            body: { scroll_id: response['_scroll_id'] },
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            

                            scroll: '15s'
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            

                        )
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            

                    end
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

            
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            

                    result
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            

                end

    172. 
            

            

            
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173.

    667.

      669.

    670.

      677.

    687. 
            

            

                        sort: [{ created_at: 'desc' }],
          
      688.

                        size: 1,
          
      689. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    689.

      690. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    690. 
            

            

                    }
          
      691. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    691.

      692. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    692. 
            

            

                    return '' unless project
          
      693. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    693. 
            

            

            
          
      694.

                    body = project.dig('_source', 'last_pulse_data', 'body')

      697. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    697. 
            

            

            
          
      698. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    698. 
            

            

                    return '' if body.blank? || user_name.blank? || created_at.nil?

      700.

      703. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    703.

      1177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1177. 
            

            

                        source: "
          
      1178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1178. 
            

            

                            params.id_body.each((k, v) -> {
          
      1179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1179. 
            

            

                                boolean keyExistsInFields = false;
          
      1180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1180. 
            

            

                                for (int i=0; i<ctx._source.fields.length; i++) {
          
      1181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1181. 
            

            

                                    if (ctx._source.fields[i].id == k) {
          
      1182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1182. 
            

            

                                        ctx._source.fields[i].text = v;
          
      1183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1183.

      1184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1184.

      1185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1185. 
            

            

                                }
          
      1186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1186. 
            

            

            
          
      1187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1187. 
            

            

                                if (!keyExistsInFields) {
          
      1188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1188. 
            

            

                                    Map newField = new HashMap();
          
      1189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1189. 
            

            

                                    newField.put('id', k);
          
      1190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1190. 
            

            

                                    newField.put('text', v);
          
      1191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1191. 
            

            

                                    ctx._source.fields.add(newField);
          
      1192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    1192. 
            

            

                                }

                def self.manual_multipart_post(uri, form_data, headers)
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213.

      214.

      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215.

    216. 
            

            

            
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                    # Generate boundary
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                    boundary = "----formdata-#{rand(1000000)}"
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

            
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                    # Build multipart body with raw binary data
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221.

      222.

      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            

                    # Add text fields

    224. 
            

            

                    text_form_data.each do |row|
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            

                        body_parts << "--#{boundary}\r\n"
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            

                        body_parts << "Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"#{row[0]}\"\r\n"
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

                        body_parts << "\r\n"
          
      228.

      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            

                    end
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            

            
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

                    file_form_data.each do |row|
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            

                        # Add file with raw binary content
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            

                        file_content = row[1].read
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            

            

                        body_parts << "--#{boundary}\r\n"
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            

            

                        body_parts << "Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"#{row[0]}\"; filename=\"#{row[2][:filename]}\"\r\n"
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            

                        body_parts << "Content-Type: #{row[2][:content_type]}\r\n"
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            

                        body_parts << "\r\n"
          
      238.

      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239.

      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            

            
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            

                    # Join text parts as string, then add binary content separately
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            

            

                    text_body = body_parts.join('')
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            

            
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            

            

                    # Construct final body: text + binary + closing boundary
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            

                    final_body = text_body.b # Convert to binary string
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            

            

                    final_body << "\r\n--#{boundary}--\r\n".b
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            

            

            
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248.

    249.

      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            

                    headers&.each { |k, v| request[k] = v }
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251.

      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            

                    request.body = final_body

                    def initialize(environment = :production)

                        @environment = environment
          
      16. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    16.

    17.

                    # Defining HTTP methods to be used for requests
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def get(path:, params: {})
          
      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21. 
            

            

                        uri_string = "#{@root_url}#{path}"
          
      22. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    22. 
            

            

                        uri = URI(uri_string)
          
      23. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    23. 
            

            

                        uri.query = URI.encode_www_form(params)
          
      24. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    24. 
            

            

            
          
      25. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    25. 
            

            

                        response = nil
          
      26. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    26. 
            

            

                        MAX_AUTH_RETRIES.times do |attempt|
          
      27. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    27. 
            

            

                            # Generate fresh headers (nonce/timestamp) for each attempt
          
      28. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    28. 
            

            

                            headers = Headers.new(url: uri_string, method: :GET, params:, credentials: @credentials).generate
          
      29. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    29. 
            

            

                            response = HttpVerb.get(uri, headers:, limit: 1)
          
      30. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    30. 
            

            

            
          
      31. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    31. 
            

            

                            # Retry 401 errors with 10-second wait
          
      32. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    32. 
            

            

                            break unless response.code == '401' && attempt < MAX_AUTH_RETRIES - 1
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33. 
            

            

            
          
      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34. 
            

            

                            sleep_time = 10
          
      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35. 
            

            

                            Rails.logger.warn "[NetSuite] 401 Unauthorized on GET #{path}, retrying in #{sleep_time}s"
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36. 
            

            

                            sleep(sleep_time)
          
      37. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    37. 
            

            

                        end
          
      38. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    38. 
            

            

            
          
      39. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    39. 
            

            

                        unless response.is_a?(Net::HTTPSuccess)
          
      40. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    40. 
            

            

                            raise_netsuite_error(response, method: 'GET', path: path, params: params)
          
      41.

                        end

                    def post(path:, body: {}, params: {}, return_method: :id)
          
      47. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    47. 
            

            

                        uri_string = "#{@root_url}#{path}"
          
      48. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    48. 
            

            

                        uri = URI(uri_string)
          
      49. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    49. 
            

            

                        uri.query = URI.encode_www_form(params)
          
      50. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    50. 
            

            

            
          
      51. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    51. 
            

            

                        response = nil
          
      52. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    52. 
            

            

                        MAX_AUTH_RETRIES.times do |attempt|
          
      53. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    53. 
            

            

                            headers = Headers.new(url: uri_string, method: :POST, params:, credentials: @credentials).generate
          
      54. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    54. 
            

            

                            response = HttpVerb.post(uri, body, headers:, limit: 1)
          
      55. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    55. 
            

            

            
          
      56. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    56. 
            

            

                            break unless response.code == '401' && attempt < MAX_AUTH_RETRIES - 1
          
      57. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    57. 
            

            

            
          
      58. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    58. 
            

            

                            sleep_time = 10
          
      59. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    59. 
            

            

                            Rails.logger.warn "[NetSuite] 401 Unauthorized on POST #{path}, retrying in #{sleep_time}s"
          
      60. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    60. 
            

            

                            sleep(sleep_time)
          
      61. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    61. 
            

            

                        end
          
      62. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    62. 
            

            

            
          
      63. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    63. 
            

            

                        puts "Response: #{response.body}"
          
      64. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    64. 
            

            

                        JSON.parse(response.body) if return_method == :body
          
      65. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    65. 
            

            

                        response['Location'].split('/')[-1] if return_method == :id
          
      66. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    66. 
            

            

                    end
          
      67. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    67. 
            

            

            
          
      68. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    68.

                    def patch(path:, body: {}, params: {})

    70. 
            

            

                        uri = URI(uri_string)
          
      71. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    71. 
            

            

                        uri.query = URI.encode_www_form(params)
          
      72. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    72. 
            

            

            
          
      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

                        response = nil

      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            

            

                            headers = Headers.new(url: uri_string, method: :PATCH, params:, credentials: @credentials).generate
          
      76.

                            headers['Prefer'] = 'transient.respondOnUpdate=true'
          
      77. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    77. 
            

            

                            response = HttpVerb.patch(uri, body, headers:, limit: 1)

      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            

            

                            break unless response.code == '401' && attempt < MAX_AUTH_RETRIES - 1
          
      80.

                            sleep_time = 10

      84.

      86. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    86. 
            

            

                        response.body

      145.

                    def get_credentials(environment)
          
      152.

                        @account_id_url = @credentials[:account_id_url]
          
      155.

                        @root_url = "https://#{@account_id_url}.#{@service}.netsuite.com/services/rest"
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156.

      157.

                    def call_restlet(script_id:, deploy_id:, params: {}, method: :get)
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

                        restlet_url = "https://#{@account_id_url}.restlets.api.netsuite.com/app/site/hosting/restlet.nl"
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                        params_with_ids = params.merge(script: script_id, deploy: deploy_id)
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

            
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            

                        uri = URI(restlet_url)
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

                        uri.query = URI.encode_www_form(params_with_ids)
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

            
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            

                        Rails.logger.info "[NetSuite RESTlet] Environment: #{@environment}"
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            

                        Rails.logger.info "[NetSuite RESTlet] Account ID: #{@account_id_url}"
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            

                        Rails.logger.info "[NetSuite RESTlet] Full URL: #{uri}"
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

                        Rails.logger.info "[NetSuite RESTlet] Script ID: #{script_id}, Deploy ID: #{deploy_id}"
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            

            
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            

                        headers = Headers.new(
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            

                            url: restlet_url,
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            

                            method: method.to_s.upcase.to_sym,
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            

                            params: params_with_ids,
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

                            credentials: @credentials
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            

                        ).generate
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            

            
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            

                        response = if method == :get
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            

                                       HttpVerb.get(uri, headers:, limit: 1)
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                                   else
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

                                       HttpVerb.post(uri, params, headers:, limit: 1)
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

                                   end
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

            
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                        Rails.logger.info "[NetSuite RESTlet] Response code: #{response.code}"
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

                        Rails.logger.info "[NetSuite RESTlet] Response body: #{response.body}"
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

            
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                        JSON.parse(response.body)
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                    end
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

            
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190.

                    private
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191.

                    def raise_netsuite_error(response, method:, path:, params: {}, body: nil)
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

                        Sentry.set_context('netsuite_request', {
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                            method: method,
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                            path: path,
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                            params: params,
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

                            body: body,
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

                            response_code: response.code,
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

                            www_authenticate: response['WWW-Authenticate']
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

                        })
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

            
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

                        error_msg = "NetSuite API error #{response.code}: #{response.body}"
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

                        error_msg += " | WWW-Authenticate: #{response['WWW-Authenticate']}" if response['WWW-Authenticate']
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            

                        raise error_msg
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

                    end
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

                end
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            

            
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

                # Generates the authorization header for making requests
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

            
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            
              1
            

            

                class Headers
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def initialize(url:, method:, params:, credentials:)
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

                        @url = url
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            

                        @method = method
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                        @params = params
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

                        @account_id = credentials[:account_id]
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

                        @consumer_key = credentials[:consumer_key]
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

                        @consumer_secret = credentials[:consumer_secret]
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

                        @token_id = credentials[:token_id]
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                        @token_secret = credentials[:token_secret]
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                        @signature_key = "#{escape(@consumer_secret)}&#{escape(@token_secret)}"
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            

                    end
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

            
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            

                    # Generates the request signature and authorization header
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            

            
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def generate
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            

                        generate_nonce
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

                        generate_timestamp
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

                        generate_signature_data
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            

                        @digest = OpenSSL::HMAC.digest(OpenSSL::Digest.new('sha256'), @signature_key, @signature_data)
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            

                        @signature = Base64.strict_encode64(@digest)
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

                        authorization_parts = {
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            

                            realm: @account_id,
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            

                            oauth_consumer_key: escape(@consumer_key),
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            

            

                            oauth_token: escape(@token_id),
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            

            

                            oauth_signature_method: 'HMAC-SHA256',
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            

                            oauth_timestamp: @timestamp,
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            

                            oauth_nonce: escape(@nonce),
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            

                            oauth_version: '1.0',
          
      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            

                            oauth_signature: escape(@signature)
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            

                        }
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            

            
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            

            

                        @authorization = "OAuth #{authorization_parts.map { |k, v| "#{k}=\"#{v}\"" }.join(',')}"
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            

                        @headers = { 'Authorization' => @authorization }
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            

            

                    end
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            

            
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            

            

                    # It may seem like this does a lot of strange stuff, but the sorting of the keys is
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247. 
            

            

                    # critical to forming a valid signature.
          
      248. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    248. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def generate_signature_data
          
      249. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    249. 
            

            

                        oauth_params = {
          
      250. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    250. 
            

            

                            oauth_consumer_key: @consumer_key,
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            

                            oauth_nonce: @nonce,
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            

                            oauth_signature_method: 'HMAC-SHA256',
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            

            

                            oauth_timestamp: @timestamp,
          
      254. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    254. 
            

            

                            oauth_token: @token_id,
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            

                            oauth_version: '1.0'
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            

            

                        }
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            

            
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            

                        merged_params = @params.merge(oauth_params)
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            

                        merged_params.transform_keys!(&:to_sym)
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            

            

                        merged_params = merged_params.sort.to_h
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            

            

                        params_string = URI.encode_www_form(merged_params).gsub('+', '%20')
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            

            

            
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            

            

                        @signature_data = [
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            

            

                            @method,
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            

            

                            escape(@url),
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            

            

                            escape(params_string)
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            

            

                        ].join('&')
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            

            

                    end
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            

            

            
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def generate_nonce
          
      271. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    271. 
            

            

                        @nonce = Array.new(20) { [*'0'..'9', *'A'..'Z', *'a'..'z'].sample }.join
          
      272. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    272. 
            

            

                    end
          
      273. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    273. 
            

            

            
          
      274. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    274. 
            
              1

    275. 
            

            

                        @timestamp = Time.now.to_i

    276. 
            

            

                    end
          
      277.

                        params = { offset: 0, limit: 1 }
          
      294. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    294. 
            

            

                        params[:q] = query if query
          
      295. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    295. 
            

            

                        response = client.list_records(object: @object, params:)
          
      296.
