                        response['totalResults'].to_i
          
      297.

                    def self.find_each(query: nil, offset: 0, limit: 1000)
          
      300. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    300. 
            

            

                        client = Client.new
          
      301. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    301. 
            

            

                        has_more = true
          
      302. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    302. 
            

            

                        while has_more
          
      303. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    303. 
            

            

                            params = { offset:, limit: }
          
      304. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    304. 
            

            

                            params[:q] = query if query
          
      305. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    305. 
            

            

                            response = client.list_records(object: @object, params:)
          
      306. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    306. 
            

            

                            response['items'].each do |item|
          
      307. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    307. 
            

            

                                internal_id = item['id']
          
      308. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    308. 
            

            

                                yield(internal_id)
          
      309. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    309. 
            

            

                            end
          
      310. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    310. 
            

            

                            has_more = response['hasMore']
          
      311. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    311. 
            

            

                            offset = response['offset'].to_i + response['count'].to_i
          
      312. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    312. 
            

            

                        end
          
      313. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    313.

    317.

                            response = client.list_records(object: @object, params:)

                            yield(ids)
          
      324.

      325.

      326.

                    def self.find(id, raise_on_not_found: true)
          
      330. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    330. 
            

            

                        raise ArgumentError, "#{name}.find requires an id, got: #{id.inspect}" if id.nil? || id.to_s.empty?
          
      331. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    331. 
            

            

            
          
      332. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    332.

                        params = {}

                        params[:expandSubResources] = true if @@allow_expanded_subresources.include? @object
          
      335. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    335. 
            

            

                        client.get_record(object: @object, id:, params:)
          
      336. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    336. 
            

            

                    rescue RuntimeError => e
          
      337. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    337. 
            

            

                        # Handle 404 errors gracefully if requested
          
      338. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    338.

      339. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    339. 
            

            

                            Rails.logger.warn "[NetSuite] Record not found: #{@object} #{id} (404 NONEXISTENT_ID)"
          
      340. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    340. 
            

            

                            return nil
          
      341.

                        raise

                # Base Class for Transaction Records which allow for the addition of items

                # and item groups to the body
          
      408. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    408.

    409. 
            
              1
            

            

                class TransactionRecord < Record
          
      410. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    410. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def add_item(id:, quantity:, amount: 0, rate: nil)
          
      411. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    411. 
            

            

                        new_item = {
          
      412. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    412. 
            

            

                            key: id,
          
      413. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    413. 
            

            

                            item: {
          
      414. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    414. 
            

            

                                id:
          
      415. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    415. 
            

            

                            },
          
      416. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    416. 
            

            

                            quantity: quantity.to_i,
          
      417. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    417. 
            

            

                            amount: amount.to_i
          
      418. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    418. 
            

            

                        }
          
      419. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    419. 
            

            

            
          
      420. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    420. 
            

            

                        new_item[:rate] = rate if rate
          
      421. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    421. 
            

            

                        new_item[:item][:rate] = rate if rate
          
      422. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    422. 
            

            

                        @body[:item][:items].push(new_item)
          
      423. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    423. 
            

            

                    end
          
      424. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    424. 
            

            

            
          
      425. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    425. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def add_item_group(id:, quantity:, amount: 0)
          
      426. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    426. 
            

            

                        item_group = ItemGroup.find(id).dig('member', 'items')
          
      427. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    427. 
            

            

                        item_group&.map do |item|
          
      428. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    428. 
            

            

                            item_id = item['item']['id']
          
      429. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    429. 
            

            

            
          
      430. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    430. 
            

            

                            add_item(id: item_id, quantity:, amount:)
          
      431. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    431. 
            

            

                        end
          
      432. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    432. 
            

            

                    end
          
      433. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    433. 
            

            

                end
          
      434. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    434. 
            

            

            
          
      435. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    435. 
            

            

                # Customer Class
          
      436. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    436. 
            

            

            
          
      437. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    437. 
            
              1
            

            

                class Customer < Record
          
      438. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    438. 
            
              1
            

            

                    @object = 'customer'
          
      439. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    439. 
            

            

            
          
      440. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    440. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def self.find_by(email: nil, phone: nil)
          
      441. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    441. 
            

            

                        # Instantiate Netsuite Client
          
      442. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    442. 
            

            

                        client = Netsuite::Client.new
          
      443. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    443. 
            

            

                        customer_id = nil
          
      444. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    444. 
            

            

            
          
      445. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    445. 
            

            

                        # Infer Customer ID from API's. Check by email and phone in primary and secondary email fields.
          
      446. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    446. 
            

            

                        # TODO: Add secondary email and phone fields to customer record in ns and query as well!
          
      447. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    447. 
            

            

                        if email
          
      448. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    448. 
            

            

                            email_query = client.query(object: 'customer', query: "email CONTAIN \"#{email}\"")
          
      449. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    449. 
            

            

                            has_email_match = email_query['totalResults'].to_i.positive?
          
      450. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    450. 
            

            

                            customer_id = email_query.dig('items', -1, 'id') if has_email_match
          
      451. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    451. 
            

            

                        end
          
      452. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    452. 
            

            

            
          
      453. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    453. 
            

            

                        if phone
          
      454. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    454. 
            

            

                            phone_query = client.query(object: 'customer', query: "phone CONTAIN \"#{phone}\"")
          
      455. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    455. 
            

            

                            has_phone_match = phone_query['totalResults'].to_i.positive?
          
      456. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    456. 
            

            

                            customer_id = phone_query.dig('items', -1, 'id') if has_phone_match
          
      457. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    457. 
            

            

                        end
          
      458. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    458. 
            

            

                        customer_id
          
      459. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    459. 
            

            

                    end

                    def generate_body

                            externalId: "sales_order_#{@project_id}",

                            location: @location_id,

                            item: {
          
      618. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    618. 
            

            

                                items: []
          
      619. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    619. 
            

            

                            }

    620. 
            

            

                        }
          
      621. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    621. 
            

            

                        @body[:status] = @status if @status
          
      622. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    622. 
            

            

                        @body
          
      623. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    623. 
            

            

                    end
          
      624. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    624. 
            

            

            
          
      625. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    625. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def self.close(sales_order)
          
      626. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    626. 
            

            

                        body_item = sales_order['item']
          
      627. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    627. 
            

            

            
          
      628. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    628. 
            

            

                        # Adding Status to each item of "Closed"
          
      629. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    629. 
            

            

                        body_item['items'].each do |item|
          
      630. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    630. 
            

            

                            item['isClosed'] = true
          
      631. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    631. 
            

            

                        end
          
      632. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    632. 
            

            

            
          
      633. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    633. 
            

            

                        closing_memo = "Closed by the Proposal Tool API due to cancellation on #{Date.today.strftime('%m/%d/%Y')}"
          
      634. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    634. 
            

            

                        body = {
          
      635. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    635. 
            

            

                            item: body_item,
          
      636. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    636. 
            

            

                            status: 'H',
          
      637. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    637. 
            

            

                            custbody_cancellation_date: Date.today.to_s,
          
      638. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    638. 
            

            

                            memo: closing_memo
          
      639. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    639. 
            

            

                        }
          
      640. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    640. 
            

            

            
          
      641. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    641. 
            

            

                        # Updating the Sales Order
          
      642. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    642. 
            

            

                        update(sales_order['id'], body)
          
      643. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    643. 
            

            

                    end
          
      644. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    644. 
            

            

            
          
      645. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    645. 
            

            

                    # Close specific line items on a Sales Order without closing the entire SO
          
      646. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    646. 
            

            

                    # @param sales_order_id [Integer] The internal ID of the Sales Order
          
      647. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    647. 
            

            

                    # @param line_numbers [Array<Integer>] The line numbers to close
          
      648. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    648. 
            

            

                    # @return [String] The response body from the update
          
      649. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    649. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def self.close_specific_lines(sales_order_id, line_numbers)
          
      650. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    650. 
            

            

                        sales_order = find(sales_order_id)
          
      651. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    651. 
            

            

                        body_item = sales_order['item']
          
      652. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    652. 
            

            

            
          
      653. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    653. 
            

            

                        # Close only the specified lines
          
      654. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    654. 
            

            

                        body_item['items'].each do |item|
          
      655. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    655. 
            

            

                            item['isClosed'] = true if line_numbers.include?(item['line'])
          
      656. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    656. 
            

            

                        end
          
      657. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    657. 
            

            

            
          
      658. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    658. 
            

            

                        # Note: Do NOT set status: 'H' here as that closes the entire SO
          
      659. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    659. 
            

            

                        body = { item: body_item }
          
      660. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    660. 
            

            

                        update(sales_order_id, body)
          
      661. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    661. 
            

            

                    end
          
      662. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    662. 
            

            

                end
          
      663. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    663. 
            

            

            
          
      664. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    664. 
            
              1
            

            

                class RevenueArrangement < TransactionRecord
          
      665. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    665. 
            
              1
            

            

                    @object = 'revenueArrangement'

    666. 
            

            

            
          
      667. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    667. 
            
              1
            

            

                    def initialize(props)
          
      668. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    668. 
            

            

                        @object = 'revenueArrangement'

    669. 
            

            

            
          
      670. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    670. 
            

            

                        generate_body

    59.

    60. 
            

            

                        fields = response_body['data']['fields']

    61. 
            

            

                        result['id'] = id

      63.

      64.

                        property_array.map do |property|

                            is_deal_field = fields[property] != '' && fields[property]
          
      67.

      68. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    68. 
            

            

                            if is_deal_field

    70.

    71. 
            

            

                                primary_customer_id = response_body['data']['primary_customer_id']
          
      72. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    72. 
            

            

                                contacts = response_body['data']['customers']
          
      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

                                contacts.select! { |contact| contact['_id'] == primary_customer_id } if primary_customer_id
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                                primary_contact = contacts.first || { 'fields' => [] }
          
      75. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    75. 
            

            

                                contact_fields = primary_contact['fields']
          
      76. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    76. 
            

            

                                result[property] = contact_fields[property]
          
      77. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    77.

    78.

                def self.get_project(id, fields: [])

                    default_fields = [
          
      104.

                        'id',
          
      105. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    105. 
            

            

                        'name',

    106. 
            

            

                        'object_id',
          
      107. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    107.

      108. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    108. 
            

            

                        'customers',
          
      109. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    109. 
            

            

                        'customers.fields'

    110. 
            

            

                    ]

    111. 
            

            

            
          
      112.

      113.

      114. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    114. 
            

            

                    uri.query = URI.encode_www_form(params)
          
      115. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    115. 
            

            

                    response = HttpVerb.get(uri)
          
      116. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    116. 
            

            

                    response_body = parse_response(response, url: uri.to_s)
          
      117. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    117. 
            

            

            
          
      118. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    118. 
            

            

                    return { 'success' => false, 'data' => nil } if response_body['status'] != 'success'
          
      119.

      120. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    120. 
            

            

                    {

                        'success' => true,

                        'data' => response_body['data']

                def self.get_incomplete_tasks(task_name, project_id: nil, project_id_array: nil, return_project_ids: false)
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

                    project_ids = project_id_array || [project_id].compact
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

            
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            

                    # If no project filter provided, fall back to Elasticsearch
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            

                    # The API doesn't handle broad task searches well (502 errors)
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            

                    if project_ids.empty?
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

                        es = ElasticSearchSunrise.new
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            

                        return es.get_incomplete_tasks(task_name, return_project_ids: return_project_ids)
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            

                    end

    174. 
            

            

                    project_ids.each do |pid|
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

                        tasks = get_all_tasks(pid)
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            

                        incomplete_tasks = tasks&.select { |t| t['name'] == task_name && !t['is_complete'] } || []
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            

                        results.concat(incomplete_tasks)
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178.

    179. 
            

            

            
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                    if return_project_ids
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

                        results.map { |task| task['project_id'] }.uniq
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

                    else
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

                        results

      276.

                    return nil if should_abort && !ignore_abort

    311.

      327.

                    parse_response(response, url: uri.to_s)['data']['items']
          
      328.

    333. 
            

            

                    task_name_array.map do |task_name|
          
      334.

                        task = tasks.detect { |task_result| task_result['name'] == task_name }
          
      335. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    335. 
            

            

                        result[task_name] = if task
          
      336.

                                                task['is_complete']

    337.

                def self.get_file_page(project_id, page_token)
          
      484. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    484. 
            

            

                    uri = URI("#{@@v2_root}/#{@@org_id}/projects/#{project_id}/files")
          
      485. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    485. 
            

            

                    headers = {}
          
      486. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    486. 
            

            

                    headers['nextPageToken'] = page_token if page_token
          
      487. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    487. 
            

            

                    uri.query = URI.encode_www_form(@@v2_headers.merge(headers))
          
      488. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    488. 
            

            

                    response = HttpVerb.get(uri)
          
      489. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    489. 
            

            

                    parse_response(response, url: uri.to_s)
          
      490. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    490. 
            

            

                end
          
      491. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    491.

                def self.get_files_v2(project_id)
          
      493. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    493. 
            

            

                    results = []
          
      494. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    494. 
            

            

                    response_body = get_file_page(project_id, nil)
          
      495. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    495. 
            

            

                    results += response_body['data']['files']
          
      496. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    496. 
            

            

                    next_page_token = response_body['data']['nextPageToken']
          
      497. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    497. 
            

            

                    while next_page_token
          
      498. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    498. 
            

            

                        response_body = get_file_page(project_id, next_page_token)
          
      499. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    499. 
            

            

                        results += response_body['data']['files']
          
      500. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    500. 
            

            

                        next_page_token = response_body['data']['nextPageToken']
          
      501. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    501. 
            

            

                    end
          
      502. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    502. 
            

            

                    results.sort_by { |file| file['created_at'] }
          
      503.

      504. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    504.

                def self.confirm_file(project_id, search)

      507. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    507. 
            

            

                    categories = es.get_categories(es.residential)
          
      508. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    508. 
            

            

                    category_id = categories[search]
          
      509. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    509. 
            

            

                    return false unless category_id
          
      510. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    510. 
            

            

            
          
      511. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    511. 
            

            

                    files = get_files_v2(project_id)

    512. 
            

            

            
          
      513. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    513. 
            

            

                    candidates = files.select do |file|
          
      514. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    514. 
            

            

                        category_id && file['category_id'] == category_id && !file['deleted']
          
      515. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    515. 
            

            

                    end
          
      516. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    516. 
            

            

            
          
      517.

      518.

    519.

    520.

                def self.get_file(project_id, category_name, search: nil, include_all_files: false)
          
      521. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    521. 
            

            

                    categories = ElasticSearchSunrise.new.get_categories('BhpMj')
          
      522. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    522. 
            

            

                    category_id = categories[category_name]
          
      523. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    523. 
            

            

            
          
      524. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    524. 
            

            

                    files = get_files_v2(project_id)
          
      525. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    525. 
            

            

                    files.reject! { |file| file['deleted'] }
          
      526. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    526. 
            

            

                    matching_files = files.select do |file|
          
      527. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    527. 
            

            

                        if category_id.present? && search.present?
          
      528. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    528. 
            

            

                            file['category_id'] == category_id && file['name'].include?(search)
          
      529. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    529. 
            

            

                        elsif category_id.present?
          
      530. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    530. 
            

            

                            file['category_id'] == category_id
          
      531. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    531. 
            

            

                        elsif search.present?
          
      532. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    532. 
            

            

                            file['name'].include?(search)
          
      533. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    533. 
            

            

                        else
          
      534. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    534. 
            

            

                            false
          
      535. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    535. 
            

            

                        end
          
      536. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    536. 
            

            

                    end
          
      537. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    537. 
            

            

            
          
      538. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    538. 
            

            

                    if include_all_files
          
      539. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    539. 
            

            

                        matching_files.map { |file_metadata| get_file_from_aws(file_metadata) }
          
      540. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    540. 
            

            

                    else
          
      541. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    541. 
            

            

                        file_metadata = matching_files[-1]
          
      542. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    542. 
            

            

                        get_file_from_aws(file_metadata)
          
      543.

                def self.get_file_from_aws(file_metadata)

    547. 
            

            

                    result = { 'file' => nil, 'name' => nil, 'content_type' => nil }
          
      548. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    548. 
            

            

            
          
      549. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    549. 
            

            

                    if file_metadata
          
      550. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    550. 
            

            

                        bucket_name = 'sunrise-files-prod'
          
      551. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    551. 
            

            

                        key = file_metadata['key']
          
      552. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    552. 
            

            

                        # type = file_metadata['type']
          
      553. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    553. 
            

            

                        name = file_metadata['name']
          
      554. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    554. 
            

            

            
          
      555. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    555. 
            

            

                        # Configure S3 client with SSL options to handle certificate issues
          
      556. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    556. 
            

            

                        # Disable SSL verification in development to bypass CRL validation issues
          
      557. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    557. 
            

            

                        s3 = Aws::S3::Client.new(
          
      558. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    558. 
            

            

                            http_open_timeout: 15,
          
      559. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    559. 
            

            

                            http_read_timeout: 60,
          
      560. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    560. 
            

            

                            retry_limit: 3,
          
      561. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    561. 
            

            

                            ssl_verify_peer: false
          
      562. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    562. 
            

            

                        )
          
      563. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    563. 
            

            

            
          
      564. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    564. 
            

            

                        tempfile = Tempfile.new
          
      565. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    565. 
            

            

                        tempfile.binmode
          
      566. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    566. 
            

            

            
          
      567. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    567. 
            

            

                        s3.get_object({ bucket: bucket_name, key: }, target: tempfile)
          
      568. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    568. 
            

            

            
          
      569. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    569. 
            

            

                        result['file'] = tempfile
          
      570. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    570. 
            

            

                        result['name'] = name
          
      571. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    571. 
            

            

                        result['id'] = file_metadata['_id']
          
      572. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    572. 
            

            

                        result['content_type'] = file_metadata['type']
          
      573. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    573. 
            

            

                        if result['content_type'].blank? || result['content_type'] == 'application/octet-stream'
          
      574. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    574. 
            

            

                            result['content_type'] = MIME::Types.type_for(name).first.content_type
          
      575. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    575. 
            

            

                        end
          
      576. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    576. 
            

            

                    end
          
      577. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    577. 
            

            

            
          
      578. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    578. 
            

            

                    result

    626.

    627.

    630.

      631.

                def format_time_to_skedulo(time_instance)
          
      291. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    291. 
            

            

                    time_array = time_instance.rfc3339.split(/[+-]/)
          
      292. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    292. 
            

            

                    time_array.pop
          
      293. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    293. 
            

            

                    time = time_array.join('-')
          
      294. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    294. 
            

            

                    time << '.000Z'
          
      295. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    295. 
            

            

                    time
          
      296. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    296. 
            

            

                end
          
      297. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    297. 
            

            

            end

    5. 
            

            

                # Always use production Skedulo API key
